## Summary

Describe the error family, source update, script change, or documentation change.

## Evidence

- Evidence level: A / B / C / D
- Related upstream issue(s):
- Dogfood level: L0 / L1 / L2

## Redaction Checklist

- [ ] No API keys, tokens, cookies, or credentials
- [ ] No private repository names or remotes
- [ ] No home directory paths or usernames
- [ ] No raw `.codex` session JSONL files
- [ ] No unredacted crash dumps or personal screenshots

## Verification

List commands run, or explain why the change is documentation-only.
